title: Zando Health - Digital Prescription Platform
problem: Access to prescription medications is fragmented. Patients need to visit doctors for repeat prescriptions.
solution: Digital health platform enabling online consultations and prescriptions for common conditions, with medication delivery.
technology: Telemedicine platform, prescription processing, pharmacy network
varden_fit: Moderate — D2C prescription platform. Different model from B2B marketplace but prescription workflow relevant.
notes: German online prescription model. Regulatory context differs from Sweden.
